series_metadata.series_title: Applicant Driving and Criminal Background Check Screening Records
series_metadata.series_description: This series includes driving histories, criminal background screening forms, documentation and determination reports for both external and internal candidates who have applied for positions within the Ohio Department of Transportation.

retention_rules.disposition: Paper: Retain in active area for two years then destroy. ; Electronic: Retain Driving History Screens and Background Authorization Forms on the secured EEO drive within the Department of Transportation Network. The files are maintained as Incidents and Cases. All files will be destroyed after seven years., Paper: Shred ; Electronic: Delete
